build: Build #30 — 200 OK + SSE with single-chunk simplified JSON {content: warning_text}

endpoint.status_meaning: Failed to fetch — browser could not complete the request (network error / connection reset / CORS)

render_generation_endpoint.note: Render generation succeeded (this is the outline container creation, not the AI generation)

ui_result.error_toast_message: 개요 생성 중 오류 발생 / 다시 시도해 주세요.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Failed to fetch

diagnosis.apf_interception: confirmed — APF intercepted the generation request
diagnosis.key_finding: Build #30 SSE response caused a network-level failure. Unlike Builds #21-#29 which returned valid HTTP responses (403/429/200), this build's response was not parseable by the browser at all. Status 0 typically means: (1) connection reset before response headers completed, (2) CORS preflight failure, (3) TLS error, or (4) response framing error in HTTP/2.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build_26: Build #26 (SSE 2-frame DATA, use_end_stream=false) successfully delivered data. Build #30's single-chunk JSON format may have different framing that breaks HTTP/2 delivery.
diagnosis.conclusion: Build #30 is a REGRESSION from Build #26. The 'Failed to fetch' error means the APF response never reached the JavaScript layer. The response framing or headers are likely malformed for HTTP/2. Need to verify: (1) Content-Type is text/event-stream, (2) HTTP/2 DATA frames are properly formed, (3) use_end_stream and use_goaway flags match Build #26 settings.
